subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Give thanks unto thy Lord, then make mention and be thou steadfast, inasmuch as God hath made thee a Lote-Tree of His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقه اشکری ربک ثم اذکری و اقنتی بما جعلک الله من سدره امره و ان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
